mapper.select: select id, doc_id, action, comment, operator_user_id, operator_name, created_at from km_review_record where id = #{id}
select id, doc_id, action, comment, operator_user_id, operator_name, created_at from km_review_record where doc_id = #{docId} order by created_at desc

select * from ( select id, doc_id, null as chunk_id, action, comment, operator_user_id, operator_name, created_at, 'REVIEW' as source from km_review_record where doc_id = #{docId} union all select l.id, c.doc_id, l.chunk_id, l.action, case when l.action = 'EDIT' then concat('编辑切片 #', l.chunk_id) when l.action = 'SPLIT' then concat('拆分切片 #', l.chunk_id) when l.action = 'MERGE' then concat('合并切片 #', l.chunk_id, ' 与下一切片') when l.action = 'DELETE' then concat('删除切片 #', l.chunk_id) else concat('切片操作 #', l.chunk_id) end as comment, l.operator_user_id, l.operator_name, l.created_at, 'CHUNK' as source from km_chunk_edit_log l join km_document_chunk c on c.id = l.chunk_id where c.doc_id = #{docId} ) timeline order by created_at desc, id desc
select id, doc_id, action, comment, operator_user_id, operator_name, created_at from km_review_record where doc_id = #{docId} order by created_at desc limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into km_review_record (doc_id, action, comment, operator_user_id, operator_name, created_at) values (#{docId}, #{action}, #{comment}, #{operatorUserId}, #{operatorName}, #{createdAt})
